name: Natural White
description: Ram's white staff that looks like a novelty pen.

name: White Rod
description: A magical rod used in the popular 'Magical Witch Girl Gemini' anime. For some reason, it is effective enough to use in an actual fight.
obtain: CFW Trick (Chapter 3 Atari Marsh Scenario): Enemy Drop

name: Aqua Rod
description: This pink and red wand is said to enhance its user's magic powers.

name: Green Staff
description: This 'clicky top' style pen-wand specializes in support magic and is generally more accepted than the 'twisty bottom' style.

name: Yellorange
description: This giant pen is light and easy to wield. Therefore, it has been a big hit with giant pen enthusiasts.

name: Gray Rod
description: This sophisticated wand is not above being a useful face whacking tool. Fortunately, it is also quite good at channeling magic powers.

name: Gray Staff
description: A new model of the 'clicky top' magic wand that harbors a condensed magic force within itself.

name: Dark Silver
description: A silver wand that resembles a fancy pen. Its primary element is of course, silver, so it excels at exorcising evil spirits.
obtain: Shop (Chapter 6 - To the Deity of Sin)

name: Blue Flower
description: This big blue pen has been layered in pretty flower decals.

name: Green Rod
description: A lot of magic energy is sealed within this luxurious magic wand.

name: Black Rod
description: A next generation magic wand. It's still just a prototype, so it still has many functions the mass-produced models will lack.

name: Blue Staff
description: A magic wand that loosely replicates the one used by Sakura, heroine of the popular anime 'Card Captor Sakura.'

name: Dogoo Pencil
description: A big sharpened pencil with a dogoo on top. Customers complain that the eraser leaves a blue, oozy smudge...

name: Lucky Dogoo Pencil
description: Note the dots range from one to six. Students use this style of pencil to choose multiple choice answers on exams.

name: Yellow Staff
description: The ultimate magic wand made through a lot of trial and error by Nepgear and Ram. Its functions exceed that of military-grade weaponry.

name: Black Staff
description: Nepgear and Ram made this after many experiments that began as a series of escalating dares. It could destroy a city in a single swing.

name: Classic Brown
description: A wooden staff in the shape of a pen that was made from a branch of an ancient tree.
obtain: Shop (Second Playthrough: Chapter 3 - Contact from Kei)

name: Metal Dogoo Pencil
description: Note the numbers 1 through 6. The last ray of hope for students taking exams is sealed within.
obtain: Show Large Medal Z from Legacy's enemy drop, found in Trinity Marsh - Add Enemies, to a man in Planeptune via Information tab.

name: Black Staff EXE
description: This magic wand is a further augmented version of the Black Staff. This can destroy the world, and you're giving it to a little girl!?
